input_text: Guidance for safe transportation of blood components
NL_requirements: The system packs components before transport.
The system checks temperature before transporting components.
If the tempValue is greater than 10, the system must not transport components.
The system must complete delivery within 14400 seconds of starting transport.
The system sends deliveryStatus upon completing the delivery.
The system receives verificationData during the verification process.
If the transport components activity fails, the system must notify the laboratory.
The system records handOver immediately after transporting components.
The system checks integrity before recording the handOver.
